[EIS Apr 2017: IBI-V3 version] 
Update of the fresh water forcing: 
inclusion of  an additional 
climatological runoff forcing (in 
monthly frequency) to complement 
the previous forcing based only on 33 
river point daily freshwater sources.

Ref : CMEMS-IBI-PUM-005-001 
New hourly3D dataset, covering the 
coastal and shelf IBI regions. 
Update of the historic best estimates 
on the catalogue. 
 
6.1 17/04/2019  [EIS Jul 2019: IBI-V4 version] 
New dataset for static files.

[EIS Jul 2020: IBI-V4 version] 
Integration of new tidal forcing. 
Use of ECMWF hourly atmospheric 
forcing.

Sotillo 
7.0 10/09/2020  
[EIS Dec 2020: IBI-V5 version] 
Implementation of the  wave forcing  
(only forecast run). 
Model upgrade. 
NetCDF-4 file format. 
Update of the historic best estimates 
on the catalogue. 
Modification of product/datasets 
names following new convention. 
 
A. Amo 
K. Guihou 
R. Aznar

Sotillo

[EIS May 2021: IBI-V5 version]

of coastal runoff).

8.0 08/08/2022 All 
[EIS November 2022: IBI-V6 version] 
Data Assimilation module update (new 
modes, MDT derived for a long free run, 
new model equivalent of SLA, SST HR 
+4D…). 
Adjustment of Gibraltar transport 
(correction of SSH at Med OBC). 
Change from average to 
instantaneous values in the 15-min 
dataset. 
Update of the historic best estimates 
on the catalogue. 
Adaptation of the document to the 
new template. 
 
A. Amo

[EIS November 2024: IBI-V7 version]
